name: Freight Bridge Cleanup Services - Cedar Rapids
tagline: Post-Construction Cleanup for the Cedar Rapids Data Center Boom
slogan: Commissioning-Ready Handoffs for QTS, Google, and Big Cedar Projects
description: Freight Bridge Cleanup Services handles post-construction cleanup for data center projects in the Cedar Rapids corridor — QTS ($10B), Google ($7B), and Big Cedar Industrial Park. After the trades wrap up, we come in with our box truck, haul off the construction debris, and sweep out the building so it's ready for commissioning. A division of Freight Bridge LLC.

hours.displayText: Mon-Fri 6AM-6PM | Sat by appointment | Sun Closed
